amazon_side_asn.description: Defines the ASN (Autonomous System Number) for the Amazon side of a Direct Connect gateway; must be in the private ASN range (64512–65534 or 4200000000–4294967294).

name.description: Name of the Direct Connect gateway; must be unique within the AWS account and up to 256 characters.

timeouts.description: Specifies timeout settings for creating, updating, and deleting the Direct Connect gateway.
